# PHIL.176 ? Informed Risk-Taking

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** risk_management
**Subcategory:** informed_risk_taking
**Domain:** RISK_MANAGEMENT
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Take calculated risks based on understanding, not blind bets

## Application
Assess risks explicitly, understand probability and impact, choose consciously

philosophy, risk-management, informed-risk-taking
